content: *도구, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 10 lbs **가치:** 50 GP --- **능력:** 민첩 {color="red"} **활용:** 폐품으로 소형 물품 조립, 1분 후 분해 (DC 20) {color="red"} **제작:** [머스킷](/212f7f5a1e8081bfbf2ff1751ac36a1d?pvs=25), [권총](/212f7f5a1e8081689f0be96f9b28ec7e?pvs=25), [종](/212f7f5a1e8081ecb643e0ab7a9461ca?pvs=25), [망원 랜턴](/212f7f5a1e8081d18ac0c35d4fdfce78?pvs=25), [플라스크](/212f7f5a1e80816c870ec9c97562c3b2?pvs=25), [덮개 랜턴](/212f7f5a1e80812695b4ee918746e4f8?pvs=25), [사냥용 덫](/212f7f5a1e80814b8d83eb8f19663c4e?pvs=25), [자물쇠](/212f7f5a1e8081e781a1c35f50b43ce6?pvs=25), [족쇄](/212f7f5a1e8081939c78c735ff08e67c?pvs=25), [거울](/212f7f5a1e80816fb665e19fc63c2232?pvs=25), [삽](/212f7f5a1e8081a69da3dfa7fdec7c32?pvs=25), [신호 호루라기](/212f7f5a1e8081d4bd8dc40bf131ad67?pvs=25), [부싯깃통](/212f7f5a1e80813da4afc2be9884e5a6?pvs=25) {color="red"}
